texto: My new story collection won’t please everyone, nor was it meant to. Then again, not everybody lives in my world. If they did, I’d have to move out and find another world to write about.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Ted Gargiulo sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “My new story collection won’t please everyone, nor was it meant to. Then again, not everybody liv…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a humor, fiction, satire, útil em momentos de humor e satire.

frase_original: My new story collection won’t please everyone, nor was it meant to. Then again, not everybody lives in my world. If they did, I’d have to move out and find another world to write about.

texto: Picture this broad: 22 going on 18. Half the guys in my class would have given their left testicle to date her. This cupcake is the guidance counselor the principal has assigned me. Miss Boyle is her name. We all call her “Miss Bubbly Water.” Imagine the teasing I have to endure from my friends. Not to mention what it’s like, sitting across from this Barbie Doll every Thursday afternoon, watching her cross and uncross her legs, while she’s lecturing me about—get this: “staying focused.” Right! My pants are on fire, and she’s handing me a crash course in Psych 101!
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Ted Gargiulo: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a amizade. O trecho “Picture this broad: 22 going on 18. Half the guys in my class would have given their left testicl…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amizade, fiction, humor pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e viagem.
